title: Day 21 Quiz — Week 3 Review
description: Verify integrated understanding of Redux, RTK Query, auth, dashboard, and performance from Week 3.

questions.prompt: In machine coding Round 3 you may refer to previous day project source code.
questions.explanation: Build from scratch without opening Days 15–20 folders — tests recall under pressure.

options.text: Core flow: scaffold, store, API, auth, dashboard shell
Write unit tests for every reducer

questions.explanation: Ship end-to-end core paths before polish.

questions.prompt: Where should theme state live in this integrated app?

options.text: Context or lightweight client slice — infrequent updates

questions.explanation: Theme fits Context from Day 15 — low-frequency preference state.

questions.prompt: Week 3 build must include? Select all that apply.
questions.explanation: Round 3 covers auth, Redux/RTK Query, theme, dashboard — not Week 4 topics.

questions.prompt: RTK Query mutations refresh lists using {{blank1}} tags.
questions.explanation: Tag invalidation connects mutations to query refetch.

questions.prompt: ProtectedRoute without hydration loading gate causes?
questions.code:
// auth starts { status: "idle", token: null }
// then hydrates token from localStorage
questions.explanation: Brief redirect to login before hydration completes — need loading state.

questions.prompt: Allowed resources during machine coding build?
questions.explanation: Exam rules: official docs only — mirrors proctored interview constraints.

questions.prompt: Complete store setup with RTK Query middleware.
questions.explanation: RTK Query requires its middleware in the store.

questions.prompt: Explain how you separate client state, server state, and theme in one app.
questions.sampleAnswer: Client UI state and auth token live in Redux slices. Server data lives in RTK Query cache with generated hooks. Theme preference uses Context from Day 15 with localStorage — infrequent updates, many readers. Each layer has one source of truth.
questions.explanation: Architecture question central to Week 3 interviews.

questions.prompt: Day 22 tomorrow focuses on? Select all that apply.
questions.explanation: Day 22 is Week 4 interview simulation — no new Redux theory.
